title: potentilla × dezhnevii
intro: Potentilla × dezhnevii, also known as the Dezhnev potentilla, is a hybrid plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae) that is a cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla tenuifolia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × dezhnevii include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
